zh.lifeSummary: 當Charles I d'ALBRET於大約1362年出生在法國努維勒-阿吉泰洛吉吉加洛內拉可時，他的父親Arnaud Amanieu d'Albret VIII36歲，母親Marguerite de Bourbon19歲。他於1400年1月27日與Marie de Sully結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1415年10月25日在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯阿古特享年54歲，埋葬在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯維爾-斯丁。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Charles I d'ALBRET于大约1362年出生在法国努維勒-阿吉泰洛吉吉加洛內拉可时，他的父亲Arnaud Amanieu d'Albret VIII36岁，母亲Marguerite de Bourbon19岁。他于1400年1月27日与Marie de Sully结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1415年10月25日在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯阿古特享年54岁，埋葬在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯維爾-斯丁。

nameMeanings.name: Charles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Germanic word, karl, meaning ‘free man’, akin to Old English ceorl ‘man’. The name, Latin form Carolus, owed its popularity in medieval Europe to the Frankish leader Charlemagne ( ?742–814 ), who in 800 established himself as Holy Roman Emperor. His name (Latin Carolus Magnus) means ‘Charles the Great’. Carolus—or Karl, the German form—was a common name among Frankish leaders, including Charlemagne's grandfather Charles Martel ( 688–741 ). Charles is the French form. The name occurs occasionally in medieval Britain as Karolus or Carolus; it had a certain vogue in West Yorkshire from the 1400s, particularly among gentry families. The form Charles was chosen by Mary Queen of Scots ( 1542–87 ), who had been brought up in France, for her son, Charles James ( 1566–1625 ), who became King James VI of Scotland and, from 1603 , James I of England. His son and grandson both reigned as King Charles , and the name thus became established in the 17th century both in the Stuart royal house and among English and Scottish supporters of the Stuart monarchy. In the 18th century it was to some extent favoured, along with James , by Jacobites, supporters of the exiled Stuarts, opposed to the Hanoverian monarchy, especially in the Highlands of Scotland. In the 19th century the popularity of the name was further enhanced by romanticization of the story of ‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’, leader of the 1745 rebellion.

en.lifeSummary: When Charles I d'ALBRET was born about 1362, in Nérac, Lot-et-Garonne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, his father, Arnaud Amanieu d'Albret VIII, was 36 and his mother, Marguerite de Bourbon, was 19. He married Marie de Sully on 27 January 1400. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 25 October 1415, in Azincourt, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, at the age of 54, and was buried in Vieil-Hesdin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Charles I d'ALBRET est né environ 1362, à Nérac, Lot-et-Garonne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, son père, Arnaud Amanieu d'Albret VIII, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Marguerite de Bourbon, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Marie de Sully le 27 janvier 1400. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 25 octobre 1415, à Azincourt, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterré à Vieil-Hesdin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Charles I d'ALBRET um 1362 in Nérac, Lot-et-Garonne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Arnaud Amanieu d'Albret VIII 36 und seine Mutter Marguerite de Bourbon 19. Er hat am 27. Januar 1400 Marie de Sully geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 25. Oktober 1415 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Azincourt, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich und wurde in Vieil-Hesdin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Charles I d'ALBRET è nato il circa 1362 nel Nérac, Lot-et-Garonne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, il suo padre, Arnaud Amanieu d'Albret VIII, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Marguerite de Bourbon, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Marie de Sully il 27 gennaio 1400. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 25 ottobre 1415, nel Azincourt, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolto a Vieil-Hesdin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Charles I d'ALBRETが約1362年にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインロト-エト-ガーオンンeラックで生まれた時，父Arnaud Amanieu d'Albret VIIIは36歳，母Marguerite de Bourbonは19歳であった。1400年1月27日にMarie de Sullyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1415年10月25日にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスアズインコウルトで54歳で死去し，フランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスヴィエイル-ヘスディンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Charles I d'ALBRET(이)가 대략 1362년 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 로트-트-가니 e라크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Arnaud Amanieu d'Albret VIII(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Marguerite de Bourbon(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1400년 1월 27일 Marie de Sully(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1415년 10월 25일 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 아지쿠르트에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 비이-헤즈딘에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Charles I d'ALBRET nasceu aproximadamente 1362, em Nérac, Lot-et-Garonne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França, seu pai, Arnaud Amanieu d'Albret VIII, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Marguerite de Bourbon, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Marie de Sully em 27 de janeiro de 1400. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 25 de outubro de 1415, em Azincourt, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França, com 54 anos, e foi sepultado em Vieil-Hesdin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Charles I d'ALBRET родился около 1362 г. в местности нeрак, лот-ет-гаронн, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция, его отцу по имени Arnaud Amanieu d'Albret VIII было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Marguerite de Bourbon, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Marie de Sully 27 января 1400 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 25 октября 1415 г. в местности азинкоурт, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 54 лет и был похоронен в местности виил-хесдин, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция.

sm.BET 1397 AND 1407: mai le 1397 e o'o I le 1407

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Charles I d'ALBRET nació aproximadamente 1362, en Nérac, Lot-et-Garonne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, su papá, Arnaud Amanieu d'Albret VIII, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Marguerite de Bourbon, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Marie de Sully el 27 de enero de 1400. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 25 de octubre de 1415, en Azincourt, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultado en Vieil-Hesdin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia.
